name: Claude Code
description: Installs the Claude Code CLI for AI-assisted development

version.description: Version of Claude Code to install (e.g., 'latest' or a specific version)

installDefaultPermissions.description: Install default .claude/settings.local.json with common permissions (cat, docker run, docker exec, find)

installSystemDeps.description: Install networking/system tools (iptables, ipset, iproute2, dnsutils)

nodeVersion.description: Node.js version to install (e.g., '20', '22', 'lts'). Set to 'none' to skip.
